channel.title: Comments for page "Autonomy, Part V"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Autonomy, Part V"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Considering how difficult continuing another person's series could be, this is quite fantastic. The exploration of Trauss here is really good, clearly building on existing stuff but still feeling very interesting and fresh. The use of 3101 and 4069 is also great and the tale is overall a very engaging read.

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded: So, I'm doing this. Figuring a way to wrap this story up. It'll still take at least one more part, but it's a thing.
